name: FIRST_ASSIGNEE_BY_TECHCLASS1
description: First assignee by TechnologyClass1 category. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH a, min(y.year) AS first_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count
RETURN a.name AS assignee, first_year, patent_count, targetpair_count
ORDER BY first_year ASC, patent_count DESC, targetpair_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 1

examples: Within Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers target-pair combinations, which company disclosed them first?
For the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category, which assignee was the earliest discloser of a target pair?
Which company first disclosed a target pair in the Cytokine related functional combination TechnologyClass1 category?
